positive: Surreal dreamscape painting of a floating library made of ancient books, anchored by giant, glowing jellyfish. The scene is set at twilight over a calm, reflective body of water. Style of Salvador Dali mixed with Studio Ghibli, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, ethereal.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, simple, cartoony
